commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=51a4ab7eae581c78b7270648b7ec464e8623dc47)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bundled provider IDs to the model-provider overlay allowlist and adds schema tests for timeout-only provider overlays.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +24. Total +35 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: provider overlay validation only checks a static lowercase allowlist, while several manifest aliases remain outside it and therefore still hit the custom-provider baseUrl/models errors.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is a narrow, mechanical schema/test repair on the PR branch.

target.title: fix(config): accept overlays for bundled provider aliases
target.body:
## Summary

- Allow bundled provider aliases to be configured as lightweight provider overlays without `baseUrl` or `models`.
- Add regression coverage for bundled provider IDs that are present in manifests but were missing from the overlay allowlist.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: bundled provider overlays were rejected as custom providers when the provider id was present in plugin manifests but absent from the schema allowlist.
- Real environment tested: local OpenClaw source checkout on this branch, exercising the production `OpenClawSchema` path.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  ```bash
  pnpm exec tsx -e 'import { OpenClawSchema } from "./src/config/zod-schema.ts"; const result = OpenClawSchema.safeParse({ models: { providers: { "qwen-oauth": { timeoutSeconds: 600 }, "ollama-cloud": { timeoutSeconds: 120 }, "novita-ai": { timeoutSeconds: 90 } } } }); console.log("schema overlay proof:", result.success ? "PASS" : "FAIL"); if (!result.success) { console.log(result.error.issues.map((issue) => issue.path.join(".") + ": " + issue.message).join("\\n")); process.exit(1); } console.log("accepted providers:", Object.keys(result.data.models?.providers ?? {}).join(", "));'
  ```
- Evidence after fix: actual terminal output captured from the command:
  ```text
  schema overlay proof: PASS
  accepted providers: qwen-oauth, ollama-cloud, novita-ai
  ```
- Observed result after fix: the real OpenClaw config schema accepts lightweight bundled-provider overlays for `qwen-oauth`, `ollama-cloud`, and `novita-ai` without requiring `baseUrl` or `models`.
- What was not tested: live provider API calls; this proof exercises config schema validation for bundled-provider overlay acceptance.

## Tests and validation

- `pnpm test src/config/zod-schema.models.test.ts`
- Production-path proof command shown above
target.author: pluviobyte
